overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic vehicle through Night City during a rainy night. The scene features heavy neon lighting, wet reflective streets, and a cyberpunk aesthetic with holographic billboards and industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: vehicle executes right turn at intersection
exits bright neon commercial area into darker industrial corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating through rain-soaked streets lined with towering neon billboards and glass skyscrapers, preparing to turn

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements with vibrant pink and cyan neon lighting covering building facades
tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass surfaces and geometric architecture
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights and street lamps
futuristic traffic signals with glowing green light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic vehicle driving through a heavy downpour in Night City. Bright neon billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the glass office towers on the left, their reflections shimmering on the wet asphalt. The vehicle approaches an intersection and executes a right turn, transitioning from the vibrant commercial district into a darker, more industrial corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with concrete sound barriers

events.description: game notification appears: Entered a new area - Wellsprings

agents.ego_description: accelerating through narrow industrial corridor flanked by concrete walls and metal fencing

entered.detail: tall brutalist concrete wall running parallel to the roadway
functional overhead lighting casting greenish-white illumination
chain-link fencing with industrial structures behind

segments.scene_description: The vehicle speeds through a narrow industrial corridor with high concrete sound barriers on the right and metal fencing on the left. The bright neon of the commercial district gives way to dimmer, functional street lighting. At approximately 15 seconds, a game notification indicates entry into the Wellsprings district. The atmosphere is more utilitarian and enclosed compared to the previous open commercial streets.

events.description: began following white delivery van through commercial streets
crossing major intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: following a white delivery van through Wellsprings commercial district, navigating intersections and crosswalks with moderate pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: white delivery van driving ahead with brake lights intermittently glowing, navigating through commercial streets

entered.detail: mixed-use structures with ground-level shops and upper-level windows
floating digital advertisements with bright animated graphics
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
illuminated shop fronts with various commercial signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial corridor, the scene opens into the Wellsprings commercial district. The vehicle follows a white delivery van through streets lined with storefronts and holographic billboards. Pedestrians are visible crossing at intersections, and the road features prominent crosswalk markings. The lighting returns to a vibrant neon atmosphere characteristic of Night City's commercial zones.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass transitioning to darker corridor

events.description: slowing down significantly behind delivery van at intersection
entering darker industrial underpass with concrete overhead structure

agents.ego_description: continuing through mixed commercial-industrial area, slowing for traffic, then entering dark underpass as the van turns away

notable_agents.action: white delivery van turning right at intersection and exiting view

entered.detail: covered roadway with heavy concrete beams and reduced lighting creating tunnel-like atmosphere
bright yellow metal railings lining the sidewalk edge
concrete walls covered in colorful urban street art and tags
utilitarian structures with minimal lighting and industrial facades

segments.scene_description: The final segment begins with the vehicle slowing behind the white van in a mixed commercial-industrial area. The van eventually turns and exits view. The environment transitions into a darker industrial underpass with yellow safety barriers and graffiti-covered walls. The lighting becomes significantly dimmer as the vehicle passes under concrete overpasses, with only distant neon glows visible through the rain and haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-slicked metropolis, transitioning from a vibrant commercial hub through a utilitarian industrial corridor and back into a neon district before ending in a dim underpass. It begins amidst a heavy downpour, gliding past shimmering glass towers and holographic advertisements before executing a right turn that leads away from the bright lights. As the vehicle enters the Wellsprings district, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed corridor defined by concrete sound barriers and dim functional lighting. The environment then opens back up into a bustling commercial zone where the camera follows a white delivery van past pedestrians and glowing storefronts. Finally, the vehicle slows as the van departs, drifting into a dark industrial underpass characterized by graffiti-covered walls and yellow safety barriers under a heavy concrete canopy.
